item.title: National Morning Meal Standards Board Officially Defunded, Leaves Behind Mountain of Reheated Meatloaf
item.description: Ghost of Bureaucracy Haunts Silver Spring as Legacy of Lunch-for-Breakfast Oversight Comes to a Grim Halt

item.title: Exact Words Accord Sparks Nationwide Military Deployment After Pothole Statement
item.description: Local DMV Issues Emergency Sirens in Response to Literal Press Releases

item.title: Fort Lee Film Commission Fires Transit Coordinator After Star Delays Spark Protests
item.description: Local commuters demand on-time arrivals; PATH train's heroic quotas fall to new lows.

item.title: Senate Trade Committee Turns to 13th-Century Water Clocks in Economic Fiasco
item.description: Bureaucrats blame ancient timekeeping for modern tariff troubles as negotiations slip into an archival quagmire.

item.title: Nap Wing Expansion Considered Critical National Infrastructure Following Tariff Crisis
item.description: Suburban office managers now weigh nap logistics against international trade policies amid pillow shortages.

item.title: Pentagon Fires Pacific Fleet Commander for 'Morning-ish' Delay, Sailors Board Carrier with Sandwiches
item.description: In an unprecedented escalation, missing the retaliatory window becomes formal charges citing 'morning-ish' as a critical lapse.

item.title: Local Accountant Claims to Have Spotted a Zero, Sparks Nationwide Panic Over Felony Rounding
item.description: Residents fear unauthorized deductions as lumber tariffs soar 400% on unregulated nothingness.

item.title: Brine-Tariff Investigator Promoted to Ceremonial Pickle Inspector, City Left in a Crunch
item.description: Local food ritual chaos ensues as bureaucracy's solution proves to be another pickle.

item.title: Maple Syrup: The Sweetest Crisis America Has Ever Faced
item.description: A local diner review triggers federal emergency measures over breakfast essentials.

item.title: Millbrook Claims 200% Tariff Triumph Amidst Hay-Scattered Commuter Crisis
item.description: In a bold stroke of agricultural diplomacy, town officials announce a new era of 'dairy sovereignty' as drivers find themselves navigating impromptu council meetings in fields.
